form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (22.28) when second at this track in a OPEN. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and nine places from 15 starts. Among the main chances.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 5th over 383m at this track beaten 3.5 lengths (22.54) behind Slippery Witch in a Grade 3/4 on April 12. Placed two back at this track. More than capable and well placed to find her best form.

form.formComment: Well supported last time and ran up to expectations, burning early to score a 5.5 lengths win at this track over 383m in 21.91. Boasts a course and distance PB in a dazzling 21.73. Top chance.
